name: Amazon Echo Show 10 (3rd Gen)
summary: A 10.1-inch HD smart display with a motorized rotating base that automatically follows you around the room, functioning as a voice-controlled smart home hub, video calling station, and entertainment display.
features: Privacy shutter for camera and mic off button
pros: Rotating display automatically tracks your movement for video calls
Excellent smart home hub with built-in Zigbee and Matter/Thread support
Large, bright 10.1-inch screen is ideal for recipes, video calls, and dashboards
Loud, room-filling stereo speakers with neodymium woofer
Camera privacy shutter and hardware mute button for security-conscious users
cons: Requires constant power — no battery option
Motion tracking can feel intrusive or unsettling for some users
Limited usefulness outside the Amazon ecosystem
Subscription services (Prime Video, Amazon Music) add cost for full value
bestFor: Central smart home hub for Alexa-based setups
Video calling in kitchens or living rooms
Security camera viewing and smart home dashboards
notBestFor: Google Home or Apple HomeKit users
Small spaces where a rotating display would be distracting
